response.original_title: Ramon Ontiveros Conspiracy to Defraud the United States
response.overview: An immigrant worker is subjected to human trafficking and labor exploitation through wage theft, forced starvation, immigration-based threats, and retaliation, carried out by Ramon Ontiveros with full awareness of how U.S. institutions fail to intervene. What unfolds is not just a private crime, but a conspiracy to defraud the United States, exploiting immigration systems, labor enforcement gaps, and bureaucratic delay to extract coerced labor while avoiding accountability. Samuel Martínez Roque exposes how structural violence turns immigrant fear into an economic resource and how exploitation thrives because the system quietly permits it.
response.tagline: A UTEP business graduate, an English speaker, an employer with a logo: Ramon Ontiveros is the American success story disfigured into its truest form.
response.title: Ramon Ontiveros Conspiracy to Defraud the United States
